menu.title: Krowi Energy Management
menu.description: Select the energy domain to configure.

data_description.current_price_entity: Entity ID of your electricity spot price source (e.g. Nord Pool current price sensor).
data_description.fx_rate_entity: Entity ID of an exchange rate sensor. Leave empty if your price source is already in the correct currency.
data_description.export_template: Jinja2 template that evaluates to the current export price. All referenced entities are tracked automatically.

data_description.current_price_entity: Entity ID of your gas price source (e.g. TTF DAM 30-day average sensor).

data_description.language: Language used for entity display names.

abort.already_configured: This energy domain is already configured.

data_description.current_price_entity: Entity ID of your electricity spot price source.
data_description.fx_rate_entity: Entity ID of an exchange rate sensor. Leave empty for no FX conversion.
data_description.export_template: Jinja2 template that evaluates to the current export price.

data_description.unit: Changing the unit does not rescale existing tariff values.
data_description.current_price_entity: Entity ID of your gas price source.

data_description.language: Language used for entity display names. Changes apply after reload.

entity_renamed.title: Krowi Energy Management: entity renamed
entity_renamed.description:
One or more entities in the **{domain_type}** entry have been renamed. Sensors may be tracking a stale entity ID until the next restart or reload.

Restart Home Assistant or reload the integration to restore correct tracking.
